content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

One blocking correctness issue: the patch's resulting configuration path still defaults final review to a Codex-only reviewer panel, failing the requested backend mix and independent cross-model review requirement.

## Amendments

1. The active resolution snapshot still records and drives a second final-review reviewer of `codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh` instead of the required `claude/claude-opus-4-6`. This is visible in the persisted stage snapshot (`.ralph-burning/projects/utm/run.json:20-27`) and the latest invocation log (`.ralph-burning/projects/utm/journal.ndjson:98-99`). It means the change did not actually implement the requested Codex+Opus reviewer default and also violates the cross-model review requirement (currently both reviewers are Codex-family). Update the default final-review backend resolution so unspecified `final_review.backends` resolves to Codex xhigh plus Opus 4.6, and ensure any snapshot/probe output reflects that.
   Rationale: Acceptance criterion explicitly requires final reviewers to be `gpt-5.4 xhigh` plus `claude-opus-4-6`; current default path is still two Codex models.
